arguments.argument:
//Integrated Visualization System (IVS) menuOpen=false
hitComboAlpha=0 //combo counter alpha hitComboFadeTime=0 //combo fade/reset time killChainAlpha=0 //kill chain alpha killChainFadeTime=0 //kill chain fade/reset time killChainText=0
background_index[7]=backStatic background_alpha[7]=0.07 background_foreground[7]=true background_hspeed[7]=31 background_vspeed[7]=21
busterWarnColor=make_color_rgb(224,64,0) airdashFrm=0 dashMeterFrm=0 airDashScl=1 doubleJumpScl=1 awesomeColorA=make_color_rgb(255,248,155) awesomeColorB=make_color_rgb(16,8,8)
dragoonBossCheck=0 enemyCheckID=0 shooterLevel="1-1"
curAwesome=global.awesomePoints curHeart=global.pLife
